# terrible_cisco_nxos_nxos_vxlan_vtep (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `interface` (String) Interface name for the VXLAN Network Virtualization Endpoint.

### Optional

- `advertise_virtual_rmac` (Boolean) The advertise_virtual_rmac parameter lets BGP to use the VMAC with VIP as next-hop when advertising type-2 routes. Should be used together with advertise_pip parameter from cisco.nxos.nxos_bgp_address_family module.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the NVE interface.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `global_ingress_replication_bgp` (Boolean) Configures ingress replication protocol as bgp for all VNIs. This is available on Nexus 9000 series switches running NX-OS software release 9.2(x) or higher.
- `global_mcast_group_L2` (String) Global multicast IP prefix for L2 VNIs or the keyword 'default'. This is available on Nexus 9000 series switches running NX-OS software release 9.2(x) or higher.
- `global_mcast_group_L3` (String) Global multicast IP prefix for L3 VNIs or the keyword 'default'. This is available on Nexus 9000 series switches running NX-OS software release 9.2(x) or higher.
- `global_suppress_arp` (Boolean) Enables ARP suppression for all VNIs. This is available on NX-OS 9K series running 9.2.x or higher.
- `host_reachability` (Boolean) Specify mechanism for host reachability advertisement.  A Boolean value of 'true' indicates that BGP will be used for host reachability advertisement. A Boolean value of 'false' indicates that no protocol is used for host reachability advertisement. Other host reachability advertisement protocols (e.g. OpenFlow, controller, etc.) are not supported.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `multisite_border_gateway_interface` (String) Specify the loopback interface whose IP address should be used for the NVE Multisite Border-gateway Interface. This is available on specific Nexus 9000 series switches running NX-OS 7.0(3)I7(x) or higher. Specify "default" to remove an existing gateway config.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `shutdown` (Boolean) Administratively shutdown the NVE interface.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `source_interface` (String) Specify the loopback interface whose IP address should be used for the NVE interface.
- `source_interface_hold_down_time` (String) Suppresses advertisement of the NVE loopback address until the overlay has converged.
- `state` (String) Determines whether the config should be present or not on the device.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `commands` (String) commands sent to the device
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
